Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface LoopContract

All Superinterfaces:
AuxiliaryContract, SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
LoopContractImpl
public interface LoopContract extends AuxiliaryContract

A contract for a block that begins with a loop.

When a loop contract is encountered in an existing proof, a LoopContract is used. To generate a new proof obligation for a block contract, use FunctionalLoopContract instead.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AuxiliaryContract

    AuxiliaryContract.Terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables, AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

  • Method Details

    • getDecreases

      Term getDecreases()
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause.

    • getDecreases

      Term getDecreases(Term heap, Term self, Services services)
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause on the specified heap.

    • getDecreases

      Term getDecreases(AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Parameters:
      variables - the variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this loop contract's decreases clause.

    • getHead

      StatementBlock getHead()

      This contains any statements that are executed before the loop.

      It is only used if the loop is a for loop, in which case it contains the loop initializers

      Returns:
      statements to execute before the loop.

    • getGuard

      Expression getGuard()
      Returns:
      the loop guard.

    • getBody

      StatementBlock getBody()
      Returns:
      the loop body.

    • getTail

      StatementBlock getTail()
      Returns:
      all statements after the loop.

    • getLoop

      LoopStatement getLoop()
      Returns:
      a loop of the form while(<getGuard()>) { <getBody()> }

    • getLoopLabels

      List<Label> getLoopLabels()
      Returns:
      all labels that belong to the loop, or an empty list if the loop is not a labeled statement.

    • isOnBlock

      boolean isOnBlock()
      Returns:
      true if this contract belongs to a block, false if it belongs to a loop.

    • update

      LoopContract update(StatementBlock newBlock, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newModifiesClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreeModifiesClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newinfFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, Term newMeasuredBy, Term newDecreases)
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      newPreconditions - the new preconditions.
      newPostconditions - the new postconditions.
      newModifiesClauses - the new modifies clauses.
      newFreeModifiesClauses - the new free modifies clauses.
      newinfFlowSpecs - the new information flow specifications.
      newVariables - the new variables.
      newMeasuredBy - the new measured-by clause.
      newDecreases - the new decreases clause.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract with the specified attributes.

    • update

      LoopContract update(LoopStatement newLoop, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newModifiesClauses, Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreeModifiesClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newinfFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, Term newMeasuredBy, Term newDecreases)
      Parameters:
      newLoop - the new loop.
      newPreconditions - the new preconditions.
      newPostconditions - the new postconditions.
      newModifiesClauses - the new modifies clauses.
      newFreeModifiesClauses - the new free modifies clauses.
      newinfFlowSpecs - the new information flow specifications.
      newVariables - the new variables.
      newMeasuredBy - the new measured-by clause.
      newDecreases - the new decreases clause.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract with the specified attributes.

    • getIndexVariable

      ProgramVariable getIndexVariable()
      Returns:
      the index variable if getLoop() is an enhanced for-loop, null otherwise.
      See Also:
      • EnhancedForElimination.getIndexVariable()

    • getValuesVariable

      ProgramVariable getValuesVariable()
      Returns:
      the values variable if getLoop() is an enhanced for-loop, null otherwise.
      See Also:
      • EnhancedForElimination.getValuesVariable()

    • setTarget

      LoopContract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Specified by:
      setTarget in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      newKJT - the type containing the new target method.
      newPM - the new target method.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different target.

    • setBlock

      LoopContract setBlock(StatementBlock newBlock)
      Specified by:
      setBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different block.

    • map

      LoopContract map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • setLoop

      LoopContract setLoop(LoopStatement newLoop)
      Parameters:
      newLoop - the new loop.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different loop.

    • replaceEnhancedForVariables

      LoopContract replaceEnhancedForVariables(StatementBlock newBlock, Services services)
      Replaces \index and \values with the proper variables in all terms of this contract.
      Parameters:
      newBlock - a new block.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a new loop contract equal to this one except that it belongs to the new block, and \index and \values are replaced by proper variables in all terms.

    • isInternalOnly

      boolean isInternalOnly()
      Returns:
      true iff this contract should only be applied using LoopContractInternalRule.

    • toBlockContract

      BlockContract toBlockContract()
      Returns a BlockContract for AuxiliaryContract.getBlock(). This is used to apply for-loop and for-each-loops: The block containing the loop is applied using a block contract; inside that block contract's validity branch, the while-loop obtained by transforming the for-loop is applied using a loop contract.
      Returns:
      a valid BlockContract for AuxiliaryContract.getBlock().
